articles.title: India set to own Israel’s Iron Dome - Could this revolutionise national defense?
articles.description: According to Israel’s Consul General Yaniv Revach, the visit is aimed at expanding defense agreements between the two nations. He indicated that the most important aspect of the potential deal could be the transfer of the Iron Dome system technology.
articles.content: New Delhi: During Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit to Israel, India is likely to gain access to Israel’s renowned Iron Dome missile defense technology. This could be a major boost to the country’s defense capabilities. The Israeli technology will... [2177 chars]

articles.title: AI Fears Shake Financial Markets: Is the Panic Justified?
articles.description: The financial markets are experiencing turmoil as fears over the disruptive potential of artificial intelligence escalate. With viral apocalyptic AI scenarios influencing investor behavior, markets have seen significant downturns. Despite the speculative nature, these concerns weigh heavily, although data indicates a more nuanced impact on employment and technology valuations.
articles.content:
In recent weeks, financial markets have been rocked by fears surrounding artificial intelligence's potential to disrupt industries. As stock prices and investor sentiment take a hit, analysts argue for a reality check on AI's true impact.
Apocalyptic... [680 chars]

articles.title: Police Officer Accused of Tracking Partner Using License Plate Reader
articles.description: The Milwaukee officer used the technology to run searches on his partner’s plate 124 times, officials said, and he also tracked the person’s ex.
articles.content:
A Milwaukee police officer was criminally charged on Tuesday after using license plate recognition technology to surveil a person he was dating and the person’s ex for two months last year, the authorities said.
The officer, Josue Ayala, 33, used the... [1332 chars]

articles.title: Fintech Chime sees 2026 revenue above estimates on strong demand, shares surge
articles.description: Feb 25 (Reuters) - Financial ⁠technology firm Chime forecast 2026 revenue above Wall Street estimates on Wednesday, ⁠helped by strong demand for its digital banking products and resilient ‌consumer spending.
articles.content:
Feb 25 (Reuters) - Financial ⁠technology firm Chime forecast 2026 revenue above Wall Street estimates on Wednesday, ⁠helped by strong demand for its digital banking products and resilient ‌consumer spending.

articles.title: Why SJ Semiconductor matters in China’s race to build home-grown AI chips
articles.description: SJ Semiconductor’s listing highlights the growing role of chip packaging in China’s strategy to narrow the technology gap.
articles.content: SJ Semiconductor, a key player in China’s advanced chip packaging sector, has received approval to list on Shanghai’s Nasdaq-style Star Market on Tuesday, marking a fresh step in the country’s push for semiconductor self-reliance amid US restrictions... [1138 chars]

articles.title: Why India needs telecom champions
articles.description: To anchor telecom manufacturing and future technology investments in India, the country must create global champions of Indian origin
articles.content:
By Ankit Agarwal, Managing Director, Sterlite Technologies
India is one of the world’s largest telecom markets, with nearly a billion internet users, and one of the fastest-growing digital economies. Yet it remains the only major power without a glob... [5787 chars]

articles.title: What's behind the Anthropic-Pentagon feud
articles.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth gave the AI company Anthropic an ultimatum about the military's use of its technology, known as Claude.
articles.content:
Washington — The Pentagon gave Anthropic an ultimatum this week: Give the U.S. military unrestricted use of its AI technology or face a ban from all government contracts.
At the center of the issue is a question of who controls how artificial intelli... [5359 chars]

articles.title: Ticker: Nvidia delivers another huge quarter; Discord postpones age verification
articles.description: Artificial intelligence chipmaker Nvidia on Wednesday announced another quarter of astounding quarterly growth as investors try to decipher whether technology's latest craze is overblown hyperbole or a springboard into a new era of prosperity and productivity.
articles.content: Artificial intelligence chipmaker Nvidia on Wednesday announced another quarter of astounding quarterly growth as investors try to decipher whether technology’s latest craze is overblown hyperbole or a springboard into a new era of prosperity and pro... [1290 chars]

articles.title: Discord postpones age verification rollout amid criticism
articles.description: The global rollout of the system is now delayed to the second half of 2026, Discord’s Chief Technology Officer and co-founder Stanislav Vishnevskiy wrote in a blog post.
articles.content: Discord, which says it has more than 200 million active users, will continue to meet specific legal obligations it has for age verification of users, the company said, but the global expansion of age verification will only come after it makes changes... [3803 chars]
